contextGate.organizationMissing: Organization context is missing. Open your workspace in the APP before changing notification settings.
contextGate.pageLoadError: Notification settings could not be loaded for this workspace. Try again shortly.
contextGate.accessDenied: Notification settings are not available for this account.

contextGate.permissionMissing: You do not have permission to view notification settings for this workspace.
contextGate.entitlementLocked: Notification settings require an entitled workspace module.

testResult.quiet_hours: ⏳ Quiet hours are active — test sound suppressed.

contextGate.subscriptionRequired: An active subscription is required before notifications can be loaded.
contextGate.permissionMissing: You do not have permission to view notifications for this workspace.
contextGate.entitlementLocked: Notifications require an entitled workspace module.

notificationInbox.emptyDescription: When Aipify has operational updates, Companion replies, or items that need attention, they appear here.
notificationInbox.archiveAllReadConfirm: Archive all read notifications? They will remain available under Archived.
notificationInbox.actionError: Could not update notifications. Try again.

intelligence.title: Organizational Intelligence
intelligence.description: Aipify can analyze approved business activity to detect bottlenecks, forgotten follow-ups, recurring tasks, and operational risks.
intelligence.privacy: Aipify only analyzes data sources you enable. Sensitive actions require approval and are logged.
intelligence.approval: Require admin approval before Aipify actions

upgrade.title: Organizational Intelligence requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Organizational Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides operational insights across your connected business activity.

predictions.title: Predictive Intelligence
predictions.description: Aipify can forecast likely bottlenecks, SLA risks, follow-up gaps, and growth opportunities from approved workflow trends.
predictions.privacy: Predictions use workflow and process data you enable. No employee surveillance. All alert actions are logged.
predictions.approval: Require admin approval before Aipify actions

upgrade.title: Predictive Intelligence requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Predictive Intelligence is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it identifies likely future risks and opportunities from approved business activity.

automation.title: Automation Settings
automation.description: Control how Aipify discovers, suggests, and runs automations.
automation.privacy: Automations require approval before activation. High-risk actions require approval every run. All actions are logged.
automation.lowRiskExecution: Allow low-risk automatic execution after approval

upgrade.title: Adaptive Automation requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Adaptive Automation is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it discovers safe automation opportunities across your operations.

governance.title: Governance Settings
governance.description: Control how Aipify requests approval, explains actions, and maintains audit transparency.
governance.privacy: Aipify never acts as a black box. Every sensitive action requires visibility, approval, and audit logging.

upgrade.title: Trust & Control requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Trust, Approval & Control Center is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides transparent governance as Aipify becomes more autonomous.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Center Settings
knowledge.description: Control how Aipify searches documentation, creates knowledge gaps, and answers questions about itself.
knowledge.privacy: Aipify must not invent answers about itself. Low-confidence questions create knowledge gaps for admin review.

upgrade.title: Knowledge Center requires Growth or above
upgrade.body: Knowledge Center is available in Aipify Growth and above because it lets Aipify support itself with trusted, editable documentation.

paymentProviders.title: Payment Infrastructure
paymentProviders.subtitle: Mission control for revenue operations — configure providers, environments, and settlement with enterprise clarity.
paymentProviders.principle: Payments are built on trust. Aipify owns the billing experience; you choose the provider.
paymentProviders.paidAccessNow: Paid = access now — features unlock immediately after payment confirmation.
paymentProviders.visualStandards: Respect the brand. Elevate the presentation — official logos on premium Aipify cards.

providerProfiles.dnbPositioning: Enterprise invoice billing for procurement teams — purchase orders, payment terms, and framework agreements.

enterpriseBilling.title: Enterprise Procurement
enterpriseBilling.description: Built for organizations requiring purchase orders, invoicing, procurement approvals, and customized payment arrangements.
enterpriseBilling.methods: DNB Invoice · Purchase Orders · Bank Transfer · 30/60/90-Day Terms · Framework Agreements

billingExperience.principle: Aipify supports both purchasing behaviors — pay now for speed, approve and procure for enterprise scale. Mission control for revenue operations.

commercialPrinciple.instant: Instant Activation: fast onboarding for customers who can make immediate purchasing decisions.
commercialPrinciple.enterprise: Enterprise Procurement: structured purchasing workflows for organizations with approval requirements.
commercialPrinciple.footer: Aipify Group AS serves both customer segments equally well. From Norway. For the world.

instantActivation.title: Instant Activation
instantActivation.description: Designed for startups, freelancers, SMBs and fast-moving teams that want immediate access to Aipify.
instantActivation.message: Activate your subscription instantly and start using Aipify within minutes.

enterpriseProcurement.title: Enterprise Procurement
enterpriseProcurement.description: Built for organizations requiring purchase orders, invoicing, procurement approvals, and customized payment arrangements.
enterpriseProcurement.message: Aipify supports established procurement practices — purchase orders, DNB Invoice, bank transfer, flexible payment terms, and framework agreements for larger organizations.

smartRouting.title: How would you like to purchase Aipify?

instant.label: Instant activation
instant.description: Ideal for smaller teams and businesses.

enterprise.label: Enterprise procurement
enterprise.description: Ideal for organizations requiring invoicing or internal approvals.

billing.title: Billing & packages
billing.subtitle: Your current package, usage, upgrades, and add-ons — pay only for what you need.

pricingPhilosophy.title: Pricing philosophy
pricingPhilosophy.principleLead: Aipify is priced as a Business Operating System — not per message or token.
pricingPhilosophy.abosPrinciple: Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS) — install-first operations, not a chat interface.
pricingPhilosophy.guidanceNote: Recommended ranges are sales guidance. Your live subscription follows your contracted plan.

bullets.operationalScope: Operational scope — installs, modules, and users

modules.title: Module management
modules.subtitle: Enable or disable purchased modules. Aipify grows with your business.

workingStyle.title: Working style
workingStyle.subtitle: Adapt how Aipify presents information, reminders, and summaries — transparently and under your control.
workingStyle.resetConfirm: Reset all working style preferences to defaults?
workingStyle.youControl: Aipify adapts. Aipify does not manipulate. You remain in control of every preference.
workingStyle.starterNote: Your plan supports manual preference selection. Adaptive learning requires Business Pro or Enterprise.

fields.adaptiveLearning: Allow adaptive learning from my usage patterns (opt-in)

workingStyle.enterpriseEmpty: No department templates configured yet. Enterprise administrators can set role-based defaults.

center.title: Trust & Control Center
center.subtitle: See what Aipify wants to do, why, who approved it, and how to stop everything immediately.
center.privacy: Observe → Suggest → Request Approval → Execute → Explain → Audit → Learn.

upgrade.title: Trust & Control requires Business Pro or Enterprise
upgrade.body: Trust, Approval & Control Center is available in Aipify Business Pro and Enterprise because it provides transparent governance as Aipify becomes more autonomous.

emergency.active: Emergency stop is active — Aipify actions are paused

audit.title: Audit Timeline
audit.subtitle: Every Aipify action is logged for transparency and accountability.

trust.title: Trust Scores
trust.subtitle: Trust scores inform recommendations only. High-risk actions still require approval.

securityCompliance.title: Security & Compliance
securityCompliance.subtitle: Policy engine, data governance, privacy requests, and security incidents.
securityCompliance.principle: Before Aipify acts, it asks: Am I allowed to do this?
securityCompliance.privacyNote: Raw secrets are never stored in normal database tables. Audit logs are retained per policy.
securityCompliance.emergencyStopActive: Emergency Stop is active — new actions are blocked
securityCompliance.incidentsSubtitle: Track and resolve security events across your tenant.
securityCompliance.secretsSubtitle: Secret references only — raw values are stored in approved vault.
securityCompliance.noRawSecrets: Raw secret values are never shown after creation. Only references are stored.
securityCompliance.policiesSubtitle: Role-based access rules evaluated by the Policy Engine.
securityCompliance.complianceSubtitle: GDPR toolkit, retention policies, and compliance reports.
securityCompliance.governanceSubtitle: Data classifications, residency, and retention overview.
securityCompliance.reportsSubtitle: Generate structured compliance and security reports.

enterpriseDeployment.title: Enterprise Deployment
enterpriseDeployment.subtitle: Cloud, hybrid, and on-premise — Aipify adapts to your network and compliance requirements.
enterpriseDeployment.principle: Control plane in the cloud, data plane in your network when you need it.
enterpriseDeployment.empty: Enterprise deployment is not available yet.
enterpriseDeployment.upgradeRequired: Hybrid and on-premise deployment requires an Enterprise plan.
enterpriseDeployment.privacy: Raw internal data never leaves your network unless explicitly allowed by policy.
enterpriseDeployment.deploymentSubtitle: Choose how Aipify runs for your organization.
enterpriseDeployment.cloudSync: Allow cloud sync of safe summaries
enterpriseDeployment.rawCloudSync: Allow raw data cloud sync (not recommended)
enterpriseDeployment.agentsSubtitle: Local agents connect outbound to Aipify Cloud — no inbound firewall rules required.
enterpriseDeployment.agentKeyOnce: Save this agent key now — it will not be shown again
enterpriseDeployment.residencySubtitle: Control where each data category is stored and whether it can sync to cloud.
enterpriseDeployment.connectorsSubtitle: Integrations that may require a local Aipify Agent.
enterpriseDeployment.auditSubtitle: Request export of agent access, approvals, and audit logs.

enterpriseDeploymentFramework.title: Enterprise Deployment Framework
enterpriseDeploymentFramework.subtitle: Structured methodology for deploying Aipify in complex environments — security, governance, and operational excellence.
enterpriseDeploymentFramework.pilotRecommended: Pilot deployment is strongly recommended to reduce implementation risk.

billingCommercial.title: Billing & Commercial Model
billingCommercial.subtitle: Flexible pricing for every stage of growth — packages, add-ons, usage, renewals, and partner billing.

subscriptionPlanManagementEngine.title: Subscription & Plans
subscriptionPlanManagementEngine.subtitle: Manage your organization's subscription, plan modules, trials, and upgrade paths — with downgrade safeguards and full auditability.
subscriptionPlanManagementEngine.noModules: No modules configured for this plan.

governancePolicyEngine.title: Governance & Policy
governancePolicyEngine.subtitle: Tenant-aware governance policies with human oversight for sensitive actions, transparent decision-making, and full audit support.

phase123.title: Enterprise Intelligence Phase 123 — Board & Governance Companion

auditAccountability.title: Audit & Accountability
auditAccountability.subtitle: Immutable, tenant-aware audit trails for every critical user and Aipify action — with search, filtering, and compliance exports.

secureAiAction.title: Secure Aipify Actions
secureAiAction.subtitle: Aipify recommends and performs operational actions within risk-classified approval boundaries — never exceeding permissions or tenant isolation.

identityPermissions.title: Identity & Permissions
identityPermissions.subtitle: Secure identity and access management — roles, permissions, approval workflows, and Aipify action governance.
identityPermissions.accessReviewsNote: Periodic privileged-access review settings — integrates Security & Trust (A.18).
identityPermissions.accessReviewSaveFailed: Failed to save access review settings
identityPermissions.companionPermissionPrefsNote: Scope companion visibility and management by role — metadata only.
identityPermissions.companionManageRestricted: Restrict companion management to elevated roles
identityPermissions.companionPrefsSaveFailed: Failed to save companion permission preferences

twoFactor.title: Aipify sign-in verification
twoFactor.subtitle: Protect your Aipify workspace
twoFactor.cardDescription: Enable sign-in verification to strengthen account security and protect administrative access.
twoFactor.whyExplanation: Sign-in verification protects your workspace and administrative privileges using time-based authentication codes.
twoFactor.authenticatorNote: Aipify uses time-based authenticator codes rather than SMS verification.
twoFactor.requiredNotice: Your role requires sign-in verification before you can access Aipify.
twoFactor.statusEnabled: Sign-in verification is enabled for your account.
twoFactor.statusDisabled: Sign-in verification is not enabled yet.
twoFactor.enableStepScan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
twoFactor.enableStepConfirm: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app — not from this page.
twoFactor.codeFromAppBody: This page does not generate the code. After scanning, open your authenticator app — the code appears there and changes every 30 seconds.
twoFactor.codeFromAppStep1: Scan the QR code (or use the manual key) in Google Authenticator, Microsoft Authenticator, or a similar app.
twoFactor.codeFromAppStep2: Open that app and find the Aipify entry — it shows a 6-digit code.
twoFactor.codeFromAppStep3: Type that code in the field below, then enter your password and confirm.
twoFactor.applePasswordsTip: Using iPhone Passwords (Nøkler)? After scanning, go to Settings → Passwords → your Aipify login → Verification Code. For a clearer experience, we recommend Google Authenticator or Microsoft Authenticator.
twoFactor.googleAuthenticatorHint: In Google Authenticator: tap + → Scan QR code → select the Aipify entry to see your 6-digit code.
twoFactor.invalidCodeHelp: Delete any old Aipify entry in Google Authenticator, tap Generate new QR code, scan again, then enter the latest code before it expires.
twoFactor.confirmPasswordHint: Confirm your identity before activating sign-in verification.
twoFactor.disablePasswordHint: Enter your current password to disable sign-in verification.
twoFactor.viewRecoveryCodesHint: Recovery codes are shown only once at activation. Regenerate new codes if you need a fresh set.
twoFactor.recoveryNotice: Save these recovery codes in a secure location. You can use them if you lose access to your authenticator app.
twoFactor.saveCodes: I have saved these codes in a secure place.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.invalidCode: That code is not valid. Check your authenticator app and try again.
errors.invalidPassword: That password is not correct. Try again.
errors.passwordRequired: Enter your current password to continue.
errors.noPendingEnrollment: Start setup again to generate a new QR code.
errors.notEnabled: Sign-in verification is not enabled for this account.
errors.requiredByPolicy: Your organization requires sign-in verification. It cannot be disabled.
errors.configError: Sign-in verification is temporarily unavailable. Contact support if this persists.

personalityEngine.title: Personality & Warmth
personalityEngine.subtitle: A trusted colleague with a warm personality — competent first, human second, funny third.
personalityEngine.philosophy: People remember how software makes them feel.
personalityEngine.safetyNote: Aipify never mocks users, uses aggressive sarcasm, forces humor, or trivializes serious events.
personalityEngine.crisisSuppression: Humor automatically suppressed — Incident Mode is active.

playfulBell.title: Playful moments & bell personality
playfulBell.playfulSuppressed: Playful moments are limited for the current mode or settings.

workstyleEngine.title: Personalization & Workstyle
workstyleEngine.subtitle: Adapt communication, notifications, learning, and desktop behavior to how you prefer to work.
workstyleEngine.philosophy: Aipify adapts to people. People never adapt to Aipify.
workstyleEngine.safetyNote: Personalization never enables employee scoring, hidden profiling, or cross-tenant sharing.
workstyleEngine.privacyNote: Preferences are private, optional, and never used for employee evaluation.
workstyleEngine.suggestionsNote: Suggestions require your consent — Aipify never imposes preferences.

securityHub.title: Security
securityHub.subtitle: Manage sign-in verification, sessions, devices, and account protection for your workspace.

signInVerification.title: Sign-in verification
signInVerification.description: Protect administrative access with authenticator-based verification.

sessionManagement.title: Session management
sessionManagement.description: Review active sessions and sign out remotely when needed.

deviceHistory.title: Device history
deviceHistory.description: See trusted devices that have accessed this workspace.

recoveryMethods.title: Recovery methods
recoveryMethods.description: Manage recovery codes and backup sign-in options.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.description: Future support for passwordless enterprise sign-in.

loginActivity.title: Login activity
loginActivity.description: Review security events and sign-in activity in the Security Center.

securityTrustEngine.title: Security & Trust
securityTrustEngine.subtitle: Proactive security transparency, access reviews, and resilience cross-links — extending Security & Trust Engine Phase A.18.

enterpriseDeploymentDeviceRolloutEngine.title: Enterprise Deployment
enterpriseDeploymentDeviceRolloutEngine.subtitle: IT admin dashboard for licenses, seats, device enrollment, and SSO/SCIM readiness.
enterpriseDeploymentDeviceRolloutEngine.scimScaffoldNote: SCIM provisioning is a readiness scaffold — full sync ships in a future phase.
enterpriseDeploymentDeviceRolloutEngine.installerPending: Enterprise installers (macOS, Windows, Linux) are prepared for IT distribution — download links pending packaging.

packageAccess.title: Packages & Access
packageAccess.subtitle: Choose the right package, upgrade when higher-value features are needed, and receive access instantly after payment.
packageAccess.noLocked: All features in your package tier are unlocked.
packageAccess.upgradeComplete: Upgrade complete. Business features are now active.
packageAccess.instantAccess: Paid = access now — no logout, no waiting.
packageAccess.privacyNote: Package metadata only — operational records stay with your organization.

approvalProfiles.title: Approval Profiles
approvalProfiles.subtitle: Define reusable approval profiles that simplify recurring decisions while preserving governance and human oversight.
approvalProfiles.privacyNote: Manual override always available — meaningful control preserved.

financialGuardrails.title: Financial Guardrails
financialGuardrails.subtitle: Enforce budgets, spending limits, and approval thresholds so Aipify participates responsibly in purchasing and financial coordination.
financialGuardrails.privacyNote: Spending metadata only — no payment instruments or raw transaction records stored.

permissionAccessGovernance.title: Permission Center
permissionAccessGovernance.subtitle: Review what Aipify can access and do — grant, revoke, and govern permissions with full transparency.

trustTransparency.title: Trust Center
trustTransparency.subtitle: Complete visibility into how Aipify operates, what it recommends, and how trust is maintained.
trustTransparency.emptySection: Nothing to show in this section yet.

moduleRegistry.title: Module Access Control
moduleRegistry.subtitle: Decide which employees can see, use, and manage each module. One APP — no separate module portals.
moduleRegistry.principle: APP owns the license. Employees inherit access. Business Pack modules appear when licensed.
moduleRegistry.privacyNote: You control employee module access within your organization only.
moduleRegistry.accessDenied: Module access control requires owner or administrator role.
moduleRegistry.appSuspended: APP license is not active — employee module access is suspended until billing is restored.
moduleRegistry.singleAppRule: All employees log into the same APP. New packages add functions — never separate logins.

employeeManagement.title: Employees
employeeManagement.subtitle: Manage your team, roles, departments, invitations, and module access — one APP for everyone.
employeeManagement.principle: APP hires people. APP controls access. Employees use what APP provides.
employeeManagement.privacyNote: Assign modules per employee — installed packs are not visible to all employees by default.
employeeManagement.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or employee number…
employeeManagement.name: Name
employeeManagement.accessDenied: Employee management requires owner or administrator role.
employeeManagement.appSuspended: APP license suspended — all employees lose access until restored.
employeeManagement.offboardWarning: Disable login, transfer tasks, retain audit history — nothing deleted.

rolePermissionMatrix.title: Roles & Permissions
rolePermissionMatrix.subtitle: Central role and permission engine — who can see, use, and manage each module inside APP.
rolePermissionMatrix.principle: Roles control access. Permissions control actions. No separate portals.
rolePermissionMatrix.visibilityRule: Visible only when: Module installed + Role allowed + Permission granted.
rolePermissionMatrix.accessDenied: Roles and permissions require owner or administrator role.
rolePermissionMatrix.noAuditEntries: No role or permission changes recorded yet.
rolePermissionMatrix.noPermissions: No explicit permission grants for this role.

dynamicNavigation.title: Navigation
dynamicNavigation.subtitle: Control how modules appear in your APP menu — pins, hidden items, and default landing page.
dynamicNavigation.principle: Menus are generated automatically from installed modules, roles, and permissions.
dynamicNavigation.visibilityRule: Visible when installed and permitted. Hidden when not installed or no permission.

activationGate.title: Activation in progress
activationGate.message: Aipify is preparing the feature and verifying that all required services are available. You will receive access automatically when validation is complete.

dynamicNavigation.accessDenied: Navigation preferences require owner or administrator role.

domainLicense.title: Domain Management
domainLicense.subtitle: Connect domains, manage Domain Licenses, and install Business Packs per domain.
domainLicense.principle: APP owns domains. Domains own Business Pack installations. Employees receive access through APP permissions.
domainLicense.accessDenied: Domain management requires owner or administrator role.

taskManagement.title: Task Center
taskManagement.subtitle: Organize, prioritize, assign, and complete work across your organization and Business Packs.
taskManagement.noTasksHint: Create a task or use a template to get started.

calendarManagement.title: Calendar Center
calendarManagement.subtitle: Organize time, schedule people and resources, and coordinate operations across your organization.
calendarManagement.noEventsHint: Schedule an event or book a resource to get started.

documentManagement.title: Document Center
documentManagement.subtitle: Organizational documents — easy to find, versioned, and retained when people change roles.
documentManagement.noDocumentsHint: Create a document or use a template to get started.

knowledgeManagement.title: Knowledge Center
knowledgeManagement.subtitle: Company memory — searchable knowledge that Aipify understands.
knowledgeManagement.searchPlaceholder: How do we handle refunds? Onboarding procedure…
knowledgeManagement.noArticlesHint: Approved knowledge articles appear here after publication.

communicationManagement.title: Communication Center
communicationManagement.subtitle: Centralize messaging, announcements, notifications, and operational conversations.
communicationManagement.subject: Subject
communicationManagement.noMessagesHint: Send a message or check announcements to get started.

notificationManagement.title: Notification Center
notificationManagement.subtitle: Tasks, approvals, documents, Companion alerts, and Business Pack events in one place.
notificationManagement.noNotificationsHint: When Aipify has something for you, it appears here.

activityFeed.title: Activity Feed
activityFeed.subtitle: Recent tasks, approvals, document updates, knowledge changes, and Companion suggestions.
activityFeed.noActivityHint: Organization activity appears here as work happens.

licenseManagement.title: License Dashboard
licenseManagement.subtitle: APP license, domain licenses, user capacity, Business Packs, renewals, and subscription status.
licenseManagement.principle: Business Packs provide functionality. Licenses provide scale. Domains define deployment. Employees consume capacity.
licenseManagement.commercialPrinciple: Small companies receive the same Business Packs and functionality. Larger organizations pay for scale — not hidden features.
licenseManagement.accessDenied: License Dashboard requires owner or administrator access.
licenseManagement.noPacksHint: Install Business Packs from the App Store — select a domain for each installation.

organizationManagement.title: Organization Center
organizationManagement.subtitle: Define departments, teams, locations, managers, and how your company is structured in Aipify.
organizationManagement.principle: Aipify adapts to how organizations operate — not rigid structures forced on customers.
organizationManagement.accessDenied: Organization Center requires owner or administrator access.

assetManagement.title: Asset Center
assetManagement.subtitle: Manage physical and digital assets — equipment, vehicles, properties, IT, and software licenses.
assetManagement.principle: Organizations should always know what they own, who is using it, where it is located, when it requires maintenance, and when it should be replaced.
assetManagement.noAssetsHint: Register equipment, vehicles, properties, and licenses your organization owns.
assetManagement.philosophy: Assets cost money. Visibility creates control. Control creates accountability.
assetManagement.scanQr: Scan QR or enter asset code
assetManagement.mobileReady: Employees can view assigned assets, scan QR codes, report issues, and confirm assignments from Mobile Access.

analyticsManagement.title: Analytics Center
analyticsManagement.subtitle: Executive visibility across operations, departments, employees, domains, and Business Packs.
analyticsManagement.principle: Managers should not need to manually gather information from multiple systems. Aipify provides a complete operational overview.
analyticsManagement.coachingNote: Analytics support coaching — not employee surveillance.
analyticsManagement.noDataHint: As your organization uses tasks, calendar, assets, and packs, Aipify will surface operational insights here.
analyticsManagement.insightsSubtitle: Convert data into recommendations — daily, weekly, monthly, and quarterly briefings.

governanceManagement.title: Governance Center
governanceManagement.subtitle: Organizational control — policies, compliance, access reviews, risks, approvals, and audit.
governanceManagement.principle: Aipify helps organizations operate efficiently. Governance ensures they operate responsibly.
governanceManagement.companionNote: Companion may recommend actions. Companion may not bypass governance.
governanceManagement.noPoliciesHint: Create internal, security, HR, and operational policies your organization must follow.

employeeLifecycle.title: Employee Center
employeeLifecycle.subtitle: Manage the full employee journey — invitation, onboarding, growth, and departure.
employeeLifecycle.principle: Organizations hire people. Aipify helps organize the journey.
employeeLifecycle.noEmployeesHint: Invite your first team member to begin the employee lifecycle.

customerRelationship.title: Customer Center
customerRelationship.subtitle: Organize, understand, and serve customers — contacts, relationships, leads, and history in one place.
customerRelationship.principle: Organizations serve customers. Aipify helps relationships create trust and growth.
customerRelationship.noCustomersHint: Add your first customer to begin building your relationship database.

serviceCase.title: Case Center
serviceCase.subtitle: Manage service cases from creation to resolution — assignments, SLA, escalations, and customer follow-up.
serviceCase.principle: Customers should never feel forgotten. Aipify helps deliver consistent service experiences.
serviceCase.noCasesHint: Create your first case to begin tracking service work and customer follow-up.

financeOperations.title: Finance Center
financeOperations.subtitle: Organize revenue, expenses, invoices, budgets, and financial visibility — accounting systems remain the source of truth.
financeOperations.principle: Aipify is not an accounting system. Aipify helps organizations organize financial operations.
financeOperations.noExpensesHint: Add your first expense to begin tracking financial operations.

projectExecution.title: Project Center
projectExecution.subtitle: Manage projects, milestones, deliverables, teams, budgets, and execution — coordinated outcomes through the Task Engine.
projectExecution.principle: Tasks manage individual work. Projects manage coordinated outcomes.
projectExecution.noProjectsHint: Create your first project or start from a template to begin coordinated execution.

salesRevenuePipeline.title: Sales Center
salesRevenuePipeline.subtitle: Manage prospects, opportunities, quotes, pipelines, revenue forecasting, and sales performance.
salesRevenuePipeline.principle: Leads are possibilities. Opportunities are potential revenue. Relationships create customers.
salesRevenuePipeline.noOpportunitiesHint: Create your first opportunity to begin managing your revenue pipeline professionally.

procurementOperations.title: Procurement Center
procurementOperations.subtitle: Manage suppliers, purchase requests, approvals, quotations, orders, receiving, contracts, and spend analysis.
procurementOperations.principle: Organizations should always know what they buy, who they buy from, why they buy it, who approved it, and what it costs.
procurementOperations.noRequestsHint: Create your first purchase request to begin managing procurement professionally.

qualityOperations.title: Quality Center
qualityOperations.subtitle: Maintain standards, manage audits, ensure compliance, track incidents, and drive continuous improvement.
qualityOperations.principle: What is not measured cannot be improved. Quality is an organizational responsibility.
qualityOperations.emptyHint: Create your first record to begin building operational excellence.

riskOperations.title: Risk Center
riskOperations.subtitle: Identify, assess, monitor, mitigate, and govern organizational risk — with business continuity and dependency mapping.
riskOperations.principle: Problems should be discovered before they become crises. Organizations should not rely on luck.
riskOperations.emptyHint: Register your first risk to begin building organizational resilience.

strategicIntelligence.title: Strategic Intelligence Center
strategicIntelligence.subtitle: Transform operational data into executive insight, recommendations, forecasts, and decision support.
strategicIntelligence.principle: Data alone has little value. Understanding creates value. Action creates results.
strategicIntelligence.accessDenied: Strategic Intelligence Center requires appropriate permissions.
strategicIntelligence.emptyHint: Generate your first executive briefing to begin strategic intelligence.

automationOperations.title: Automation Center
automationOperations.subtitle: Universal workflow orchestration — triggers, conditions, actions, approvals, and templates across every module.
automationOperations.principle: Employees should not perform repetitive work when automation can perform it safely.
automationOperations.emptyHint: Create your first workflow or start from a template to automate business processes.
automationOperations.approvalAware: Automation assists. Humans authorize — approval gates are never bypassed.

universalSearch.title: Universal Search
universalSearch.subtitle: Search everything across your organization — customers, people, projects, documents, workflows, and more.
universalSearch.principle: Do not make users navigate. Help users discover.
universalSearch.searchPlaceholder: Search customers, people, projects, documents, workflows…
universalSearch.emptyHint: Try a name, company, project, or natural language query like Show all overdue tasks.
universalSearch.permissionNote: Results respect your permissions — only authorized data is shown.
universalSearch.smartRecommendations: Related content may appear based on your search context.
universalSearch.keyboardShortcut: Press Cmd+K or Ctrl+K from anywhere to search.

activityOperations.title: Activity Center
activityOperations.subtitle: Universal organizational timeline — since last login, personal and organization activity, approvals, and Companion highlights.
activityOperations.principle: Users should never need to search for what changed. Aipify should tell them.
activityOperations.permissionMissing: You do not have permission to view activity history for this organization.
activityOperations.entitlementMissing: Activity history is not included in your current plan or module access.
activityOperations.organizationMissing: Organization context is required before Aipify can load activity history.
activityOperations.loadError: Activity history could not be loaded
activityOperations.emptyHint: There is no verified activity since your last visit.
activityOperations.sinceLastLoginSubtitle: What happened while you were away — personalized summary with context and next steps.

companionCommandCenter.title: Companion Command Center
companionCommandCenter.subtitle: The operational brain of your organization — what happened, what matters, what requires action, and what comes next.
companionCommandCenter.principle: Users should not open Aipify and wonder where to begin. Aipify should already know.
companionCommandCenter.accessDenied: Companion Command Center requires appropriate permissions.
companionCommandCenter.actionCenterSubtitle: Tasks, approvals, reviews, meetings, workflows, and escalations — everything requiring attention.
companionCommandCenter.searchPlaceholder: Find customer, contract, employee, invoice, workflow…
companionCommandCenter.emptyHint: Aipify will surface priorities as organizational activity flows in.

knowledgeGraphOperations.title: Knowledge Graph Center
knowledgeGraphOperations.subtitle: Connect everything in your organization — customers, employees, projects, documents, Business Packs, and approvals.
knowledgeGraphOperations.principle: Organizations do not suffer from lack of data. Organizations suffer from disconnected data.
knowledgeGraphOperations.organizationalMemorySubtitle: Remember organizational history — who approved, why decisions were made, and what changed.
knowledgeGraphOperations.emptyHint: Aipify connects entities and relationships as your organization works.

integrationHubOperations.title: Integration Center
integrationHubOperations.subtitle: Connect external systems, platforms, APIs, and business applications — the connectivity layer of Aipify.
integrationHubOperations.principle: Aipify should not force organizations to replace systems. Aipify should connect systems.
integrationHubOperations.emptyHint: Aipify connects your existing systems — install connectors from the marketplace.
integrationHubOperations.marketplaceSubtitle: Install approved integrations for productivity, commerce, finance, CRM, support, and more.
integrationHubOperations.syncSubtitle: Track last sync, duration, records processed, errors, and warnings.
integrationHubOperations.webhooksSubtitle: Track webhook endpoints, events, status, retries, and failures.
integrationHubOperations.apiSubtitle: Manage API keys, usage, rate limits, permissions, and audit history.

marketplaceOperations.title: Marketplace Center
marketplaceOperations.subtitle: Discover, purchase, install, upgrade and manage Business Packs — the commercial distribution layer of Aipify.
marketplaceOperations.principle: Organizations should be able to expand Aipify without contacting sales or support.
marketplaceOperations.emptyHint: Browse Business Packs and install capabilities per domain license.

simulationOperations.title: Digital Twin Center
simulationOperations.subtitle: Simulate decisions, forecast outcomes, test scenarios and understand consequences before acting.
simulationOperations.principle: Test before you risk. Simulate before you spend. Understand before you decide.
simulationOperations.emptyHint: Create scenarios to model decisions before committing resources.
simulationOperations.scenariosSubtitle: Model hires, expansions, pack installs, cost changes, and operational shifts.
simulationOperations.decisionLabSubtitle: Compare options by cost, risk, complexity, time, and expected return.

executionOperations.title: Execution Center
executionOperations.subtitle: Execute approved actions on behalf of your organization — with mandatory permissions and audit.
executionOperations.principle: Aipify helps get it done. Humans remain in control. Permissions and audit are mandatory.
executionOperations.emptyHint: Approved actions will appear here for execution.
executionOperations.actionsSubtitle: Everything executable from one center — email, meetings, invoices, contracts, tasks, and more.
executionOperations.templatesSubtitle: Reusable workflows for onboarding, reviews, kickoffs, and renewals.

companionPresenceOperations.title: Companion Center
companionPresenceOperations.subtitle: Always-available Aipify across desktop, mobile and future devices — present without being intrusive.
companionPresenceOperations.principle: Users should never need to wonder where Aipify is. Companion is a coworker, not a chatbot.
companionPresenceOperations.emptyHint: Connect desktop or mobile Companion to get started.
companionPresenceOperations.desktopSubtitle: Windows, macOS and Linux — chat, search, approvals, and quick actions without browser tabs.
companionPresenceOperations.mobileSubtitle: Mobile Access first — dashboard, tasks, approvals, briefings and notifications anywhere.

evolutionOperations.title: Evolution Center
evolutionOperations.subtitle: Continuously help your organization improve adoption, maturity, and operational effectiveness.
evolutionOperations.principle: Most software tracks activity. Aipify helps organizations improve, mature, and evolve.
evolutionOperations.emptyHint: Companion will surface recommendations as usage patterns emerge.
evolutionOperations.adoptionSubtitle: Track installed, used, unused, and abandoned features and Business Packs.
evolutionOperations.maturitySubtitle: Measure how effectively your organization uses Aipify — from Getting Started to Aipify Advanced.

inventoryOperations.title: Inventory Center
inventoryOperations.subtitle: Service inventory, consumables, multi-location stock, purchasing, and receiving — Aipify prepares; you decide.
inventoryOperations.principle: What you have. Where it is. What services consume. What to reorder.
inventoryOperations.privacyNote: Inventory metadata only — no customer PII in stock records.
inventoryOperations.empty: Inventory Center is unavailable for this workspace.
inventoryOperations.noRecordsHint: Aipify will surface inventory records as your organization configures products, locations, and stock.
inventoryOperations.noProductsHint: Create your first product to begin managing inventory professionally.

installDiscovery.title: Install & Discovery Center
installDiscovery.subtitle: Connect systems, discover your business, import data, and configure Aipify from what you already use.
installDiscovery.principle: Aipify adapts to the business. The business should not adapt to Aipify.
installDiscovery.whereManaged: Where is this data currently managed?
installDiscovery.noConnectionsHint: Select where your business data lives — Aipify handles connection and discovery.

formsDataCollection.title: Forms Center
formsDataCollection.subtitle: Create digital forms, collect data, manage submissions, approvals, and workflow automation.
formsDataCollection.principle: Employees should never need paper forms if a digital workflow can do the job better.
formsDataCollection.noFormsHint: Create your first form or start from a template to replace paper processes digitally.

peopleOperations.title: People Center
peopleOperations.subtitle: Workforce administration, attendance, leave, development, performance reviews, and goals.
peopleOperations.principle: Employees are not resources. Employees are people.
peopleOperations.noWorkforceHint: Add employees in Employee Management to build your workforce directory.
peopleOperations.mobileReady: Managers can approve leave, review employees, and manage goals from mobile.

corporateMemory.title: Knowledge Center
corporateMemory.subtitle: Organizational memory — documents, knowledge articles, playbooks, templates, and corporate wisdom.
corporateMemory.principle: Knowledge should survive employee turnover. Documents should not be lost.
corporateMemory.philosophy: Documents store information. Knowledge creates understanding. Experience creates wisdom.
corporateMemory.searchPlaceholder: Show warehouse procedures. Find onboarding documents…
corporateMemory.emptyHint: Approved knowledge and documents appear here after publication.
corporateMemory.mobileReady: Employees can search, read, and contribute knowledge from mobile.

marketingBrandOperations.title: Marketing Center
marketingBrandOperations.subtitle: Campaigns, content, audiences, channels, brand assets, and marketing performance.
marketingBrandOperations.principle: Marketing should be measurable. Brands should remain consistent.
marketingBrandOperations.philosophy: Marketing creates awareness. Relationships create trust. Trust creates customers.
marketingBrandOperations.emptyHint: Approved campaigns and content appear here after review and publication.
marketingBrandOperations.mobileReady: Employees can review campaigns, approve content, and monitor performance from mobile.
marketingBrandOperations.partnerReferralNote: Growth Partners receive approved materials with unique referral links — never generic platform links.

schedulingOperations.title: Scheduling Center
schedulingOperations.subtitle: Events, bookings, appointments, resources, availability, and calendar coordination.
schedulingOperations.principle: Time is one of the most valuable resources an organization owns.
schedulingOperations.philosophy: Time is a resource. Scheduling creates coordination. Coordination creates execution.
schedulingOperations.emptyHint: Events and bookings appear here after scheduling and confirmation.
schedulingOperations.mobileReady: Employees can view calendars, book resources, and manage appointments from mobile.

notificationOrchestration.title: Notification Center
notificationOrchestration.subtitle: Inbox, alerts, approvals, digests, routing, and communication orchestration.
notificationOrchestration.principle: The right information should reach the right person at the right time.
notificationOrchestration.philosophy: Information creates awareness. Awareness creates action. Action creates results.
notificationOrchestration.emptyHint: Alerts, approvals, and companion insights appear here as your organization operates.
notificationOrchestration.mobileReady: Employees can receive notifications, approve requests, and respond to alerts from Mobile Access.
notificationOrchestration.organizationMissing: Organization context is missing. Select or configure your workspace before using Notification Center.
notificationOrchestration.subscriptionRequired: Notification Center requires an active organization subscription.
notificationOrchestration.permissionMissing: You do not have permission to access Notification Center. Contact your organization administrator.
notificationOrchestration.entitlementMissing: Notification Center is not included in your organization's active Business Packs or plan.

mobileApiIntegration.title: Mobile API Integration Center
mobileApiIntegration.subtitle: Connect mobile APIs, push systems, SMS, webhooks, and external notification channels with polite delivery controls.
mobileApiIntegration.principle: Aipify may connect to external mobile and notification systems — but must never send notifications in tide og utide.
mobileApiIntegration.philosophy: Notify only when it matters. No spam. No uncontrolled broadcasts.
mobileApiIntegration.accessDenied: Mobile API Integration Center requires appropriate permissions.
mobileApiIntegration.emptyHint: Connect a mobile API or webhook to deliver notifications through your existing systems.

organizationOperations.title: Organization Center
organizationOperations.subtitle: Manage complex business structures — domains, brands, divisions, departments, subsidiaries, and operating units in one place.
organizationOperations.principle: Most companies are not one thing. Aipify understands organizational structure.

workspacesPage.title: Workspaces
workspacesPage.subtitle: Organize Head Office, Support, Commerce, Warehouse, and other operational workspaces with users, Business Packs, and domains.

trustCenterOperations.title: Trust Center
trustCenterOperations.subtitle: Complete visibility into security, access, identity, verification, audit history, and trust-related activities across your organization.
trustCenterOperations.principle: Trust must be visible. Security must be understandable. Know who did what, when, why, and whether it was authorized.

devicesPage.title: Device Trust Center
devicesPage.subtitle: Review trusted, unrecognized, suspicious, and blocked devices across your organization.

twoFactorPage.title: 2FA Center
twoFactorPage.subtitle: Authenticator apps, backup codes, recovery flow, and adoption across identities.

auditPage.title: Audit History Center
auditPage.subtitle: Logins, permission changes, approvals, executions, workflow changes, and Companion actions.

knowledgeNetworkOperations.title: Knowledge Network Center
knowledgeNetworkOperations.subtitle: Transform knowledge, experience, decisions, procedures, and lessons learned into reusable organizational intelligence.
knowledgeNetworkOperations.principle: Organizations lose knowledge when people leave and projects end. Aipify preserves organizational wisdom.

lessonsPage.title: Lessons Learned
lessonsPage.subtitle: Reusable lessons from projects, customer success, security, suppliers, and growth partners.

experiencePage.title: Experience Library
experiencePage.subtitle: What worked, what failed, what to repeat, and what to avoid — practical organizational experience.

marketIntelligenceOperations.title: Market Intelligence Center
marketIntelligenceOperations.subtitle: Understand markets, competitors, industries, trends, and external business conditions — public information only.
marketIntelligenceOperations.principle: Most organizations know what happens inside the company. Few understand what happens outside. Aipify monitors both.
marketIntelligenceOperations.ethicsNote: Public sources only. No surveillance. No unethical intelligence gathering.

marketsPage.title: Market Observatory
marketsPage.subtitle: Track regional markets, growth rates, competition levels, and market health.

revenueOperations.title: Revenue Operations Center
revenueOperations.subtitle: Unified growth system connecting sales, marketing, customer success, subscriptions, renewals, Growth Partners, and Business Packs.
revenueOperations.principle: Revenue is not a number — it is the result of healthy customers, successful partners, valuable products, and strong execution.

pipelinePage.title: Pipeline Engine
pipelinePage.subtitle: Track leads, opportunities, quotes, proposals, negotiations, wins, and losses.

aiWorkforceOperations.title: AI Workforce Center
aiWorkforceOperations.subtitle: Deploy, manage, supervise, and govern digital employees that augment your organization under explicit accountability.
aiWorkforceOperations.principle: Aipify does not replace employees. Aipify augments employees. Digital employees assist under governance and supervision.
aiWorkforceOperations.supervisorRule: Every digital employee must have an owner, manager, audit history, and explicit permission scope.

employeesPage.title: Digital Employee Registry
employeesPage.subtitle: Employee ID, role, department, skills, permissions, manager, status, and activity history.

trainingPage.title: Training Engine
trainingPage.subtitle: Train digital employees from Knowledge Center, policies, playbooks, and approved data sources.

companionSkillsOperations.title: Companion Skills Center
companionSkillsOperations.subtitle: Install, govern, and train specialized Companion capabilities through approved skills, specialists, and knowledge modules.
companionSkillsOperations.principle: The Companion should not know everything by default. The Companion gains expertise through approved skills. Organizations decide what Companion knows and can do.
companionSkillsOperations.governanceNote: Every knowledge source must be governed. Skills must never bypass governance.

marketplacePage.title: Skill Marketplace
marketplacePage.subtitle: Install new capabilities — review permissions, dependencies, approve, install, train, and activate.

trainingPage.title: Skill Training Engine
trainingPage.subtitle: Train specialist skills using approved organizational content from Knowledge Center, policies, and playbooks.

companionMemoryEvolution.title: Companion Memory Center
companionMemoryEvolution.subtitle: Long-term organizational context, user understanding, and operational awareness — governed, transparent, and privacy-controlled.
companionMemoryEvolution.principle: Companion should become smarter over time — not by remembering everything, but by remembering what matters.

companionOrchestrationOperations.title: Companion Orchestration Center
companionOrchestrationOperations.subtitle: Coordinate Companion Specialists behind one unified Aipify Companion experience — routing, delegation, collaboration, and governance.
companionOrchestrationOperations.principle: Users should interact with one Companion. Behind the scenes, multiple specialists may collaborate — the user should never need to know which specialist performed which task.

companionGovernanceOperations.title: Companion Governance Center
companionGovernanceOperations.subtitle: Trust, safety, oversight, and organizational control for Aipify Companion — transparency, policies, approvals, and audit.
companionGovernanceOperations.principle: The more capable Companion becomes, the more important governance becomes. Companion must never become a black box.

companionEcosystemOperations.title: Companion Ecosystem Center
companionEcosystemOperations.subtitle: Trusted services, verified providers, and the service marketplace — Companion coordinates expertise; organizations decide.
companionEcosystemOperations.principle: Companion should not do everything itself — Companion coordinates trusted services.

companionRealWorldOperations.title: Service Coordination Center
companionRealWorldOperations.subtitle: Real-world service coordination — transportation, hospitality, property, professional services, and more. Companion coordinates; humans approve.
companionRealWorldOperations.principle: Companion should help organizations accomplish real-world outcomes — human approval, governance, and audit remain mandatory.

companionMarketplaceOperations.title: Companion Marketplace Center
companionMarketplaceOperations.subtitle: Discover, install, and manage Companion Extensions — Aipify provides the platform, the ecosystem provides innovation.
companionMarketplaceOperations.principle: The Companion should be infinitely expandable — trusted extensions with full governance.

enterpriseNetworkOperations.title: Enterprise Network Center
enterpriseNetworkOperations.subtitle: Collaborate, communicate, and exchange information through a governed and trusted inter-organization network.
enterpriseNetworkOperations.principle: Most business systems stop at the organization boundary — Aipify safely connects organizations through governed collaboration.

federationOperations.title: Federation Center
federationOperations.subtitle: Coordinate intelligence, collaboration, and approved operations across organizations — with strict separation, privacy, governance, and ownership.
federationOperations.principle: Organizations may collaborate, share, and coordinate — but always remain independent.

futureReadinessOperations.title: Future Readiness Center
futureReadinessOperations.subtitle: Continuously prepare for growth, disruption, change, and long-term success — Companion helps organizations think ahead.
futureReadinessOperations.principle: Most companies focus on today — successful companies prepare for tomorrow.
futureReadinessOperations.emptyState: Future Readiness Center data is unavailable.

resilienceOperations.title: Resilience Center
resilienceOperations.subtitle: Prepare for, respond to, and recover from disruptions — Aipify helps organizations remain operational under pressure.
resilienceOperations.principle: Successful organizations are defined by how they respond when problems occur.

proactiveOperations.title: Proactive Operations Center
proactiveOperations.subtitle: Aipify continuously monitors organizational activity, identifies opportunities, and prepares actions before you ask — humans remain in control.
proactiveOperations.principle: Most systems wait for instructions — Companion observes, understands, and prepares.
proactiveOperations.emptyState: Proactive Operations Center data is unavailable.

autopilotOperations.title: Autopilot Center
autopilotOperations.subtitle: Define approved operational boundaries where Aipify may proactively assist, prepare, and coordinate recurring work — humans define boundaries.
autopilotOperations.principle: Companion should never become uncontrolled automation — trusted assisted automation with human-defined boundaries.

executiveCopilotOperations.title: Executive Command Center
executiveCopilotOperations.subtitle: Operate the organization through Aipify using natural language, guided workflows, and governed execution — one leadership workspace.
executiveCopilotOperations.principle: Leaders should not need to navigate 100 screens — ask, and Aipify understands, prepares, coordinates, and executes approved actions.
executiveCopilotOperations.emptyState: Executive Command Center data is unavailable.

headquartersOperations.title: Digital Headquarters
headquartersOperations.subtitle: The living operational headquarters where executives, managers, employees, and Aipify collaborate in real time — not a dashboard, but a command environment.
headquartersOperations.principle: Organizations need one place to instantly understand what is happening, what requires attention, who is responsible, and what comes next.

expertiseOperations.title: Expertise Center
expertiseOperations.subtitle: Know-Who Engine — identify expertise, knowledge ownership, mentorship, and organizational risk before knowledge walks out the door.
expertiseOperations.principle: Knowledge tells organizations what exists. Expertise tells organizations who can help.

decisionMemoryOperations.title: Decision Center
decisionMemoryOperations.subtitle: Decision Intelligence Engine — preserve organizational reasoning, outcomes, and lessons so future teams understand why decisions were made.
decisionMemoryOperations.principle: Organizations should not only remember decisions — they should remember why they made them.

organizationalLearningOperations.title: Learning Center
organizationalLearningOperations.subtitle: Organizational Learning & Continuous Improvement — remember lessons, capture success, and improve systematically.
organizationalLearningOperations.principle: Experience alone does not create improvement. Learning creates improvement.

maturityEvolutionOperations.title: Maturity Center
maturityEvolutionOperations.subtitle: Organizational Capability Maturity & Evolution — understand where you are, where you want to be, and what is required to get there.
maturityEvolutionOperations.principle: Performance shows where an organization is today. Maturity shows where it can go tomorrow.

memoryGraphOperations.title: Memory Graph Center
memoryGraphOperations.subtitle: Organizational Memory Graph & Context Engine — understand how people, projects, customers, and knowledge connect.
memoryGraphOperations.principle: Information without context creates confusion. Context creates understanding.
memoryGraphOperations.emptyState: Memory Graph Center data is unavailable.

digitalTwinSimulationOperations.title: Digital Twin Center
digitalTwinSimulationOperations.subtitle: Organizational Digital Twin & Business Simulation — explore outcomes before actions occur.
digitalTwinSimulationOperations.principle: The future cannot be predicted perfectly. But it can be explored.
digitalTwinSimulationOperations.emptyState: Digital Twin Center data is unavailable.
digitalTwinSimulationOperations.whatIfSubtitle: Test ideas before they become expensive mistakes — Companion generates projections.

executionOutcomeOperations.title: Execution Center
executionOutcomeOperations.subtitle: Organizational Execution Network & Outcome Engine — transform decisions into measurable outcomes.
executionOutcomeOperations.principle: Ideas create possibilities. Execution creates results.

workflowProcessOperations.title: Workflow Center
workflowProcessOperations.subtitle: Organizational Workflow Orchestration & Process Intelligence — understand, visualize, improve and orchestrate workflows.
workflowProcessOperations.principle: Organizations do not run on software. Organizations run on processes.

resourceCapacityOperations.title: Resource Center
resourceCapacityOperations.subtitle: Organizational Resource Management & Capacity Intelligence — understand capacity before problems occur.
resourceCapacityOperations.principle: Most operational problems are not caused by lack of work. They are caused by lack of visibility into capacity.

checkoutVat.title: Checkout
checkoutVat.subtitle: Confirm billing details and VAT before payment.
checkoutVat.legalReviewBanner: This checkout tax engine must be reviewed with accounting and legal before public launch.
checkoutVat.reverseChargeNote: Reverse charge. VAT to be accounted for by the customer.
checkoutVat.invalidBusinessNumber: Invalid business number. You will be charged standard VAT unless a valid number is provided.
checkoutVat.invalidEuVatNumber: Invalid VAT number. Standard VAT will be added unless a valid VAT number is provided.
checkoutVat.validationUnavailable: Validation service is temporarily unavailable. Standard VAT will be applied.
checkoutVat.businessNumberRequired: Business number is required for business customers.

unifiedBilling.title: Billing
unifiedBilling.subtitle: Plan, subscription, invoices, billing profiles, tax status, and licenses in one place.
unifiedBilling.principle: Aipify owns the billing truth. Payment providers process payments.
unifiedBilling.privacyNote: Billing metadata only — no raw payment card data stored.

profile.title: Billing profile
profile.subtitle: Legal identity, tax classification, and invoice details Aipify uses for all purchases.
profile.accessDenied: Only organization owners and administrators may change billing profiles.

businessPackRuntime.title: Business Pack Runtime
businessPackRuntime.subtitle: View installed Business Packs, deployment health, permissions, updates, and license status for your organization.
businessPackRuntime.principle: Your installed Business Packs run in secure, domain-verified runtime — Aipify manages lifecycle; your team retains control.
businessPackRuntime.privacyNote: Pack runtime metadata only — operational data stays in your organization.
businessPackRuntime.emptyState: Business Pack runtime data is unavailable.
businessPackRuntime.noRecords: No records in this section yet.

changeHistory.title: Change History
changeHistory.subtitle: Platform changes that affect your organization — releases, maintenance, and scheduled updates.
changeHistory.principle: Aipify keeps your organization informed about platform changes that affect your workspace.
changeHistory.privacyNote: Tenant-scoped change history only — no other customer data visible.
changeHistory.noRecords: No platform changes recorded for your organization yet.
